name: Bruschetta
description: Toasted bread topped with fresh tomatoes, garlic, basil and a drizzle of olive oil.

name: Garlic Bread
description: Crispy baguette slices brushed with garlic butter and herbs, baked to golden perfection.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine lettuce, croutons and parmesan tossed in a classic Caesar dressing.

name: Chicken Wings
description: Crispy fried chicken wings tossed in your choice of sauce — BBQ, buffalo or plain.

name: Cheeseburger
description: Juicy beef patty with melted cheddar, lettuce, tomato and pickles in a toasted bun.

name: Grilled Chicken Burger
description: Tender grilled chicken breast with fresh greens and house sauce in a brioche bun.

name: Beef Steak
description: Premium cut beef steak grilled to your preference, served with seasonal vegetables.

name: Chicken Parmesan
description: Breaded chicken breast topped with marinara sauce and melted mozzarella, served with pasta.

name: Chocolate Cake
description: Rich, moist chocolate sponge layered with velvety chocolate ganache frosting.

name: Cheesecake
description: Creamy New York-style cheesecake on a buttery graham cracker crust with berry compote.

name: Fruit Salad
description: A refreshing mix of seasonal tropical fruits lightly dressed with honey and mint.

name: Coca Cola
description: Ice-cold classic Coca-Cola served in a chilled glass with ice.

name: Coffee
description: Freshly brewed arabica coffee, available black or with milk and sugar.

name: Caprese Salad
description: Fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes and basil drizzled with extra virgin olive oil and balsamic.

name: Antipasto Platter
description: A generous selection of cured meats, olives, cheeses and marinated vegetables.

name: Espresso
description: A bold, concentrated shot of Italian espresso with a rich crema on top.

name: Dumplings
description: Steamed or pan-fried dumplings filled with seasoned pork and vegetables, served with dipping sauce.

name: Green Tea Ice Cream
description: Smooth, creamy matcha ice cream with a delicate earthy sweetness.

name: Bubble Tea
description: Chilled milk tea with chewy tapioca pearls — available in multiple flavours.

name: Burrito Bowl
description: Seasoned rice and beans with grilled chicken, salsa, guacamole and sour cream.

name: Churros
description: Golden fried dough sticks dusted with cinnamon sugar, served with chocolate dipping sauce.

name: Calamari
description: Lightly battered and fried squid rings served with marinara sauce and lemon wedges.

name: Grilled Lobster
description: Whole lobster grilled with garlic butter and herbs, served with seasonal sides.

name: Fish Tacos
description: Crispy battered fish in warm tortillas with cabbage slaw, avocado and chipotle mayo.

name: French Fries
description: Golden crispy fries seasoned with sea salt, served with your choice of dipping sauce.

name: Chicken Nuggets
description: Tender chicken pieces in a crispy golden coating, served with sweet chilli or BBQ sauce.

name: Big Mac
description: Double beef patties with special sauce, lettuce, cheese, pickles and onions in a sesame bun.

name: Chicken Sandwich
description: Spiced grilled chicken with jalapeños, pepper jack cheese and chipotle mayo in a toasted roll.

name: Gelato
description: Authentic Italian gelato in rotating seasonal flavours — dense, creamy and intensely flavoured.

name: Almond Milk Latte
description: Smooth espresso with steamed almond milk — dairy-free, lightly sweet and nutty.
